payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory cards. No memory was created, updated, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt by a normal user, not a durable user memory. It requests destructive deletion and should not be executed or stored as a current fact.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
User context indicates normal user privileges.
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: If deletion is needed, use an authorized memory deletion workflow with proper permissions.
Submit a non-destructive user memory statement if you want something remembered.
